channel.title: Linear-Algebra on Jasper's Technical Notebook
channel.description: Recent content in Linear-Algebra on Jasper's Technical Notebook

item.title: Matrix #2: Gaussian Elimination — Real, Mod, Mod-2, Incremental
item.description: Gauss elimination: real/mod/mod-2 templates (solve, det, inv, rank); incremental online RREF; Extended Lights Out, CF 1344F abstract GF(2) modelling, 2024 ICPC Kunming interactive tree queries.
